UserID.description: User ID whose sessions to revoke

role_id_map.description: Mapping of old role IDs to new role IDs

ScopeID.description: Entity ID at the target scope

overrides.description: Per-environment overrides (nil fields inherit type defaults)

type_defaults.description: Default settings for the environment type

Key.description: Publishable key to resolve the app

groups.description: Definitions grouped by namespace and category

setting.description: Resolved setting with scope cascade details

settings.description: Resolved settings with scope cascade details

scope.description: Scope where the value was set

ScopeID.description: Entity ID at the target scope

get.description: Returns service manifest with version, base path, and available endpoints.
Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the AuthSome API.

delete.description: Removes per-app client configuration overrides, reverting to plugin defaults. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns the per-app client configuration overrides. Nil fields inherit from plugin defaults. Requires admin role.

put.description: Creates or updates per-app client configuration overrides. Nil fields inherit from plugin defaults. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Removes the per-app session configuration overrides, reverting to global/environment defaults. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns the per-app session configuration overrides for the specified app. Requires admin role.

put.description: Creates or updates the per-app session configuration overrides. Nil fields inherit from global/environment config. Requires admin role.

bind_to_ip.description: Bind sessions to IP address (nil = inherit)

max_active_sessions.description: Maximum active sessions per user (nil = inherit)

refresh_token_ttl_seconds.description: Refresh token TTL in seconds (nil = inherit)

rotate_refresh_token.description: Rotate refresh token on use (nil = inherit)

token_format.description: Token format: opaque or jwt (empty = inherit)

delete.description: Revokes all sessions for a specific user. Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates multiple users in a single request. Duplicate emails are skipped. Requires admin role.
Terminates the current impersonation session. Can be called by the impersonated session itself.
Creates a short-lived session as the target user. The session carries an audit trail of the impersonating admin. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns all organizations for an app. Requires admin role.
Returns all registered setting definitions grouped by namespace and category. Includes UI metadata for auto-generating settings forms.
Returns setting definitions for a specific plugin namespace.

delete.description: Removes the enforcement flag from a setting without changing its value.

put.description: Sets a value AND marks it as enforced, preventing lower scopes from overriding it.

scope_id.description: Entity ID at the target scope

put.summary: Enforce a setting value at a scope

get.description: Resolves all registered settings for the given scope context. Returns effective values, scope cascade breakdown, and enforcement state.
get.summary: Resolve all settings at a scope

get.description: Resolves a single setting with full cascade details including value at each scope, enforcement state, and whether the value can be overridden.
get.summary: Resolve one setting with cascade details

delete.description: Removes a setting override at the specified scope, reverting to the next higher scope's value or the code default.
delete.summary: Delete a setting override at a scope

put.description: Sets a setting value at the specified scope. Fails if the setting is enforced at a higher scope.

scope_id.description: Entity ID at the target scope

put.summary: Set a setting value at a scope

get.description: Returns basic analytics for the application. Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of all users. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user and all associated data. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns a user by ID. Requires admin role.

post.description: Bans a user and revokes all active sessions. Requires admin role.
Removes a ban from a user account. Requires admin role.
Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires current password.

get.description: Returns the merged client-facing configuration for an app resolved by the publishable key provided via the 'key' query param. No authentication required.
Returns all tracked devices for the authenticated user.
Returns details of a specific tracked device.
Returns all environments for an app.

post.description: Creates a new environment for an app.

color.description: UI badge color (hex, defaults to type color)

delete.description: Deletes an environment. Cannot delete the default environment.

get.description: Returns details of a specific environment.

patch.description: Updates an environment's name, description, or settings.

post.description: Clones an environment's config and structure (roles, permissions, webhooks) into a new environment.

settings.description: Settings overrides for the cloned environment

slug.description: URL-safe slug for the cloned environment

post.description: Sets an environment as the default for its app.

get.description: Returns the resolved settings for an environment (type defaults merged with overrides).

post.description: Initiates a password reset flow. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

get.description: Returns service health status and database connectivity.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data (GDPR right to erasure). This action is irreversible.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields.

get.description: Returns all authentication methods linked to the current user.

delete.description: Removes an authentication method from the current user. Cannot remove the last method.

get.description: Returns all data associated with the authenticated user for GDPR data portability.
Returns all organizations the authenticated user belongs to.

post.description: Creates a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Checks whether an organization slug is available.

post.description: Accepts a pending organization invitation using the invitation token.
Declines a pending organization invitation using the invitation token.

delete.description: Deletes an organization and all its members.

get.description: Returns details of a specific organization.

patch.description: Updates an organization's name or logo.

get.description: Returns all pending invitations for an organization.

post.description: Creates an invitation to join an organization.

get.description: Returns all members of an organization.

post.description: Adds a user as a member of an organization.

delete.description: Removes a member from an organization.

patch.description: Updates a member's role within an organization.

get.description: Returns all teams in an organization.

post.description: Creates a new team within an organization.

delete.description: Deletes a team from an organization.

get.description: Returns details of a specific team.

patch.description: Updates a team's name or slug.

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for new session and refresh tokens.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to exchange for new tokens

post.description: Resets a user's password using a reset token. Revokes all existing sessions.

get.description: Returns all RBAC roles for an app.

post.description: Creates a new RBAC role.

delete.description: Deletes a role and its permissions and assignments.

get.description: Returns a role by ID.

patch.description: Updates a role's name or description.

parent_id.description: Parent role ID for inheritance (empty string to clear)

post.description: Assigns a role to a user, optionally scoped to an organization.

get.description: Returns all permissions for a role.

post.description: Adds a permission (action + resource) to a role.

action.description: Permission action (e.g. read, write, delete, admin)

delete.description: Removes a permission from a role.

post.description: Removes a role assignment from a user.

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Revokes a specific session by ID.

post.description: Authenticates a user with email/username and password.
Terminates the current session.
Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens.

get.description: Returns all roles assigned to a user.

post.description: Verifies a user's email address using a verification token.

get.description: Returns all registered webhooks for an app.

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint registration.

get.description: Returns details of a specific webhook.

patch.description: Updates a webhook's URL, events, or active status.
